targetVision.notes: The hub is structured for broad, continuously expanding ServiceNow interview coverage.

status.status: Wave 6 fixed empty placeholders, orphan topics, and zero-coverage modules
Mobile Developer and Threat Intelligence Developer now have direct and mapped study coverage
DevOps, Mobile, SOAP Integrations, Threat Intelligence, and Virtual Agent now resolve study content
Previously taxonomy-only topics now have direct study items and search coverage
Wave 6 added direct theory, coding, and use-case items without changing the static hosting model
